description: Embedded unified line-diff viewer (ActionUIDiff add-on): renders the difference between two texts (inline or read from files) as hunks with line-number gutters and +/- markers; display-only, no observable value.

oldText.description: Inline text for the old (left) side to compare

newText.description: Inline text for the new (right) side to compare

oldFile.description: Absolute local path (tilde-expanded), read as UTF-8; used only when oldText is absent

newFile.description: Absolute local path (tilde-expanded), read as UTF-8; used only when newText is absent

contextLines.description: Unchanged lines kept around each change; default 3, must be >= 0

maxRenderedLines.description: Render cap before a truncation note; default 300, must be > 0
